items.title: David Malukas Cleared To Race; X-Rays, Scans Negative For Bruised Knee
items.summary: David Malukas was cleared to race in Sunday's Music City Grand Prix after a scary accident in practice.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England beat France in 10-goal thriller to win 'bronze final'
items.summary: Bukayo Saka scores a hat-trick as England beat France 6-4 in a thriller to record their best men's World Cup finish since 1966.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Tempo coach Sandy Brondello suspended over ‘protected species’ comment about Angel Reese
